issues.reason: The bat at [1,2] is annotated as the northwest pickaxe guard, but the pickaxe at [2,1] can be reached from the upper approach through [3,3] -> [3,2] -> [3,1] without fighting this bat. As placed, the monster functions as lower detour pressure, not a concrete reward guard for the tool.
issues.required_change: Move the northwest pickaxe guard onto the actual upper approach, preferably [3,3], or otherwise make [1,2] the only practical approach to [2,1] without changing resource quotas.

required_changes: Move the northwest pickaxe guard so it blocks the actual approach to the pickaxe at [2,1], with [3,3] as the smallest monster-coordinate repair.
summary: Enemy ids and codes are allowed, special use is whitelisted, max-special limits are respected, and no enemy tiles are orthogonally adjacent. The only blocking monster-placement issue is that the northwest bat does not actually guard its claimed pickaxe reward.
